results.rendered_html:
vy-ava-√dhā P. Ā. -dadhāti, -dkatte, to place apart or asunder,  ŚāṅkhBr. ;
to put or place between, interpose,  Ragh. ;
to leave out, omit,  Kāṭh. ;
to separate, divide, interrupt,  BhP.  :
Pass. -dhīyate, to be separated or divided or interrupted,  R. ;  BhP.  :
Caus., -dhāpayati, to separate,  Naiṣ.

results.rendered_html:
vyavadhā 3 U.
1 To place between, interpose, intervene; prekṣya sthitāṃ sahacarīṃ vyavadhāya dehaṃ  R. 9. 57 ,
2 To hide, conceal, screen; śāpavyavahitasmṛtiḥ  Ś. 5. 
3 To separate, divide.
4 To obstruct, interrupt.
5 To neglect, omit, pass over; see vyavahita also.
